name: construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, frequent discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and budgets.
problem_solved: Frequent discrepancies between subcontractor invoices and project budgets.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Frequent discrepancies between subcontractor invoices and project budgets.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, frequent discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and budgets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of invoices and budgets

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, frequent discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and budgets.
